name: io.github.jina-ai/mcp
title: Jina AI MCP Server
description: Remote MCP server providing web reading, search, screenshots, embeddings, reranking, and PDF extraction via Jina AI APIs.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer token for Jina AI API authentication (e.g. 'Bearer jina_xxx'). Optional for some tools, required for search and advanced features.
